name: Cool'n Easy (Watermelon) Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz package Cool Whip non-dairy whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in 2/3 cup boiling water in a bowl.
2. Mix the remaining 1/2 cup cold water and ice to make 1-1/4 cups.
3. Stir the cold water mixture into the dissolved gelatin until slightly thickened.
4. Remove any remaining ice from the gelatin mixture.
5. Stir in the Cool Whip until smooth.
6. Refrigerate for 10 minutes or until the mixture will mound.
7. Spoon the chilled mixture into a crust.
8. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
9. Garnish with additional Cool Whip if desired.
Makes 8 servings.
Sugar-Free JELL-O brand gelatin and Cool Whip Lite whipped topping can be substituted.
